ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: NOT( OR( ISPICKVAL(Task_Type__c, "Resident Engineer"), ISPICKVAL(Task_Type__c, "Resident Engineer-PD"), AND( ISPICKVAL(Task_Type__c,'T&E'), OR( ISPICKVAL(Related_PS_Task__r.Task_Type__c, "Resident Engineer"), ISPICKVAL(Related_PS_Task__r.Task_Type__c, "Resident Engineer-PD") ) ) ) ) && ISCHANGED(Task_Start_Date__c)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Task Start Date can not be edited. Task Type is not Resident Engineer/Resident Engineer-PD
